title: Dr Mews Queer Sci Fi Podcasts
description: Doctor Mew is an audience-interactive sci fi comedy about redemption, species regeneration and becoming feline. Clive a toxic sci-fi podcaster moaning about wokeness threatening his favourite sci fi program Dr Who is accidently is regenerated into a cat. His wife thinks it’s an improvement! His wife and her lover Betty give him a new name, Doctor Mew. Renamed, neutered and Doctor Mew has still not lost his love for podcast as he claws his ways to be the top cat in podcast world. Doctor Mew tells of his adventures as well as he shares his wisdom giving bad advice to famous characters the universe and talks about feline view of the world. Expect audience interaction, fabulous props and a few jokes about sci -fi. Audiences are welcome to cos play.
